title: Voluntary Passage
storyPurpose: Oathwarden rejects Meridian auth; recognizes voluntary bonds; Seris retreats lower route.

panels.description: Oathwarden Seraph: tall ceremonial black-and-silver armor, split judgment mask, cyan oath flame, long judgment spear, broken Keeper cloak, floating lock rings, one armor side corrupted, orbiting memory mirrors corruption recedes; cyan oath flame steadies; Mirror Verdict clears.

bubbles.text: Meridian authorization rejected. Bonds acted by choice.
bubbles.speaker: Oathwarden Seraph

panels.description: Seris Vale: Meridian commander, sharp features, storm-dark field coat with three-arc sigil, carries Lost City Rift component crystal retreating into lower sealed route with Lost City component; furious controlled exit.

bubbles.text: Keep your Gate. The Forge will not need it.
bubbles.speaker: Seris Vale

panels.description: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes to Cael Vesper the Lanternmaster: mid-40s, warm brown skin, silver-threaded dark hair, deep blue and ember-gold coat, brass lantern clasps, half-mask of painted wood with nested lantern motif: accountability without abandonment; Lumenhare weak in Cael's arms; Nira nods once.

bubbles.text: You travel with us. Under watch. Under truth.
bubbles.speaker: Mira Eggwarden

bubbles.text: I will not ask for trust. Only the road.
bubbles.speaker: Cael Vesper

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Black stone, pale silver metal, moss and timber first; cyan Rift light, deep red warning runes, restrained violet gate shimmer as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy neon default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Traitor's Gate" Issue #7, STORY PAGE 23/25 — Voluntary Passage. Story purpose: Oathwarden rejects Meridian auth; recognizes voluntary bonds; Seris retreats lower route. Layout: three-stack. 3 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p23a): Oathwarden Seraph: tall ceremonial black-and-silver armor, split judgment mask, cyan oath flame, long judgment spear, broken Keeper cloak, floating lock rings, one armor side corrupted, orbiting memory mirrors corruption recedes; cyan oath flame steadies; Mirror Verdict clears. Panel 2 (p23b): Seris Vale: Meridian commander, sharp features, storm-dark field coat with three-arc sigil, carries Lost City Rift component crystal retreating into lower sealed route with Lost City component; furious controlled exit. Panel 3 (p23c): Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes to Cael Vesper the Lanternmaster: mid-40s, warm brown skin, silver-threaded dark hair, deep blue and ember-gold coat, brass lantern clasps, half-mask of painted wood with nested lantern motif: accountability without abandonment; Lumenhare weak in Cael's arms; Nira nods once. Characters: mira-eggwarden, cael-vesper, seris-vale, oathwarden-seraph, nira-quill. Creatures: lumenhare, spark, truthwing. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Egg lock: dormant Riftborn egg: warm oval shell with cyan-amber seam markings, soft pulse glow, no full hatch — visually identical across pages. Oathwarden lock: Oathwarden Seraph: tall ceremonial black-and-silver armor, split judgment mask, cyan oath flame, long judgment spear, broken Keeper cloak, floating lock rings, one armor side corrupted, orbiting memory mirrors. Environment: Traitor Gate approaches. Time: day. Lighting: black stone with cyan rift accents. Continuity: {"seris": "retreated", "cael": "supervised", "passage": "allowed"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed, Voltkit
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes; Gate text formal.
artAlt: Voluntary Passage — The Traitor's Gate page 23
transcript: SPEECH (Oathwarden Seraph): Meridian authorization rejected. Bonds acted by choice.
SPEECH (Seris Vale): Keep your Gate. The Forge will not need it.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): You travel with us. Under watch. Under truth.
WHISPER (Cael Vesper): I will not ask for trust. Only the road.
